title: Velvety Sweet Egyptian Sausage Casserole
description: A comforting one‑pot Egyptian dish that blends sweet potato, coconut milk, and wholesome spices with plant‑based sausage for a velvety, sweet‑savory experience.
instructions: In a large, oven‑proof skillet, sauté diced onion in a splash of oil until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add minced garlic; cook for another minute until fragrant.
Dice the sweet potato into 1‑inch cubes and add to the skillet, cooking for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Slice the plant‑based sausage links into half‑meter rounds and add them to the skillet.
Sprinkle chickpea flour, smoked paprika, and salt over the mixture, stirring to coat all ingredients evenly.
Pour coconut milk over the contents, bringing the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Stir in maple syrup and ground almonds, then reduce heat to low and let simmer for 10 minutes until the sweet potato is tender.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Remove from oven, stir in fresh cilantro and lemon juice, then serve hot.
